label: WhatsApp Receive
description: Fires an execution when a WhatsApp message arrives at the project's WhatsApp bridge. Wire this node's `endpointUrl` input from a WhatsAppBridge node; the listener subscribes to the bridge's SSE events stream and fires on every `message.received` event.

inputs.name: endpointUrl
inputs.description: Output of a WhatsAppBridge node. The listener subscribes to <endpointUrl without /action>/events.

outputs.name: file
outputs.description: Stored-file reference for image/video/audio/document/sticker messages; absent for text.
